title: T-027 — carriers schema + Server Actions + carriers_list_page (SHIP-014b) (11-shipping-h)
prompt:
# T-027 — Carriers CRUD + UI list

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-014b Carriers List & CRUD, §6 D-SHP-19 Manual Dispatch P1 + Carrier API P2 (export-only), §9 (carrier as plain text P1)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:424-466 (carriers_list_page) + modals.jsx:792-807 (carrier_create_edit_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `carriers` ref table + Server Actions for CRUD + carriers_list_page. P1 dispatch is manual; carrier_configs API integration is P2 (BL-SHIP-05 P2 carrier rate quote stays out of scope).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration creates `carriers` (org_id, code text UNIQUE per org, name text, scac_code char(4) — Standard Carrier Alpha Code, contact_email, contact_phone, tracking_url_template text, service_levels text[], is_active boolean DEFAULT true, R13). RLS + FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id().
2. shipments.carrier text column receives a soft FK to carriers.code (P1 — no hard FK constraint; P2 widens to FK).
3. Server Actions `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/carriers.ts`:
   - `createCarrier(input)` / `updateCarrier(id, patch)` / `deactivateCarrier(id)` — all gated by `ship.so.create` (carrier admin shorthand) and audit-logged.
4. `/(shipping)/settings/carriers/page.tsx` renders carriers_list_page (doc-screens.jsx:424-466): table + Create/Edit modal (modals.jsx:792-807).
5. **Carrier integration is export-only (D-SHP-19)**: carriers are configured for outbound shipment tracking_url generation; never accept inbound writes to canonical shipping state (canonical state mutations happen only via Server Actions T-007/T-020/T-025).
6. Four states + i18n `shipping.carriers.*`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_carriers.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/carriers.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/carriers.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/carriers.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/settings/carriers/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/settings/carriers/_components/carriers-list.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/settings/carriers/__tests__/carriers-list.test.tsx [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingCarrierCreated/Updated/Deactivated]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when DB inspected, then carriers exists with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id() + UNIQUE(org_id, code).
2. Given createCarrier succeeds, when DB inspected, then row exists; outbox shipping.carrier.created emitted.
3. Given carriers_list_page renders, when compared to doc-screens.jsx:424-466, then header + filters + 6-col table + Create/Edit modal trigger match — RTL + Playwright screenshot.
4. Given a carrier API attempts to call any shipping mutation directly (simulated test), when policy evaluates, then the call is rejected per D-SHP-19 export-only contract.
5. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: testcontainers Postgres for schema + vitest for Server Actions + RTL for UI list asserting AC 1-5.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-carriers-schema && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run shipping/carriers`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-carriers.spec.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not introduce hard FK from shipments.carrier in P1 (text column only).
- Do not implement carrier_configs API integration (P2 per D-SHP-19).
- Do not accept inbound carrier API writes to canonical state.
- Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
- Do not implement BL-SHIP-05 carrier rate quote modal (P2).
- Do not regress accessibility.

pipeline_inputs.description: Carriers ref table + CRUD Server Actions + carriers_list_page UI; export-only carrier contract per D-SHP-19.
pipeline_inputs.details: P1 manual dispatch — carriers are config-only. P2 widens to carrier API integration with rate quotes (BL-SHIP-05). Inbound carrier API writes never mutate canonical shipping state.
out_of_scope: Do not implement BL-SHIP-05 carrier rate quote modal (P2).
Do not implement carrier API integration (P2).
acceptance_criteria: Given migration runs, when DB inspected, then carriers exists with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS + UNIQUE(org_id, carrier_code).
Given createCarrier succeeds, when DB inspected, then row exists and outbox shipping.carrier.created emitted.

Given carriers_list_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:424-466, then header + filters + 6-col table + Create button match prototype (parity checklist); AND given a carrier API inbound mutation, when policy evaluates, then call is rejected per D-SHP-19 export-only contract (R15 anti-corruption).
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-carriers-schema && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run shipping/carriers`.
